@graph.description: TB-500 is a synthetic fragment of thymosin beta-4 marketed for muscle recovery and connective-tissue repair; the underlying Tβ4 biology has real scientific grounding, but the synthetic fragment sold as TB-500 has thin direct human evidence and an unresolved FDA compounding status pending July 2026 PCAC review.
@graph.name: TB-500
